2603.15227.title: Bidirectional Chinese and English Passive Sentences Dataset for Machine Translation
2603.15227.paper_summary: Machine Translation (MT) evaluation has gone beyond metrics, towards more specific linguistic phenomena. Regarding English-Chinese language pairs, passive sentences are constructed and distributed differently due to language variation, thus need special attention in MT. This paper proposes a bidirectional multi-domain dataset of passive sentences, extracted from five Chinese-English parallel corpora and annotated automatically with structure labels according to human translation, and a test set with manually verified annotation. The dataset consists of 73,965 parallel sentence pairs (2,358,731 English words, 3,498,229 Chinese characters). We evaluate two state-of-the-art open-source MT systems with our dataset, and four commercial models with the test set. The results show that, unlike humans, models are more influenced by the voice of the source text rather than the general voice usage of the source language, and therefore tend to maintain the passive voice when translating a passive in either direction. However, models demonstrate some knowledge of the low frequency and predominantly negative context of Chinese passives, leading to higher voice consistency with human translators in English-to-Chinese translation than in Chinese-to-English translation. Commercial NMT models scored higher in metric evaluations, but LLMs showed a better ability to use diverse alternative translations. Datasets and annotation script will be shared upon request.
2603.15227.paper_summary_zh: 機器翻譯（MT）評估已經超越了指標，朝向更具體的語言現象。關於英中語言對，因語言變異，被動句的構造和分佈有所不同，因此在機器翻譯中需要特別關注。本文提出了一個雙向多領域的被動句數據集，該數據集從五個中英平行語料庫中提取，並根據人工翻譯自動標註結構標籤，還包括一個經過人工驗證標註的測試集。該數據集包含73,965對平行句子（2,358,731個英語單詞，3,498,229個漢字）。我們使用這個數據集對兩個最先進的開源機器翻譯系統進行評估，並對四個商業模型使用測試集進行評估。結果顯示，與人類不同，模型更受源文本的語態影響，而不是源語言的一般語態使用，因此在翻譯被動句時，無論方向如何，往往傾向於保持被動語態。然而，模型對中文被動語態的低頻率和主要負面語境有一定的認識，這導致在英譯中與人類翻譯者的語態一致性高於中譯英。商業NMT模型在指標評估中得分較高，但LLMs在使用多樣的替代翻譯方面顯示出更好的能力。數據集和標註腳本將根據要求分享。
2603.15227.author: Xinyue Ma et.al.
2603.15227.authors: Xinyue Ma, Pol Pastells, Mireia Farrús, Mariona Taulé
